features.name: one_hot FSM state encoding with excess state register bits
features.description: Code should include a one-hot FSM state encoding where the state register width exceeds the number of defined states, leaving some bit positions unassigned
features.snippet:
localparam [4:0] IDLE=1, START=2, WORKING=4, END=8;
reg [4:0] cstate, nstate;

features.name: async reset FF with multi_bit state reset value
features.description: Code should include an asynchronous reset flip-flop where the reset value is a multi-bit pattern representing a one-hot state

features.name: FSM case statement with incomplete state coverage
features.description: Code should include an FSM implemented with a case statement that does not cover all possible values of the state register
